title: JSON Decoding, DTOs, Domain Types, Unknown Fields, and Schema Drift
description: The program decodes into map[string]any, asserts nested types, confuses absent with zero, trusts response identity, and breaks when harmless unknown fields appear. Learners cumulatively produce typed PokéAPI DTO-to-domain admission boundary through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define narrow transport structs with exact JSON tags, nested shapes, optionality, and only fields needed by the command.
Choose unknown-field tolerance deliberately, bound the body before decoding, reject trailing JSON, and preserve decode causes.
Validate ID, name, dimensions, stats, types, abilities, URLs, and collection bounds before constructing domain values.
